lines.speaker: Dartog
lines.text: Hello, surface-dweller. Can I help you?

lines.speaker: Dartog
lines.text: The council posted me here to guard this new tunnel. I can also give you directions through the tunnels. A hero like you is always welcome in our mines!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you show me the way to the mines?

lines.speaker: Dartog
lines.text: Of course! You're always welcome in our mines!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you show me the way to Lumbridge Castle cellar?
